reviews.text:
Beautiful.

A modern expression of Alex, which is cultured by the people who live here.

Scandi vibes, but without the extremes of minimalism.

Comfortable, spacious and clean.

Prices are very fair.

The team I witnessed are dedicated to serving and meeting the needs of their cu
reviews.author: Enoch YHVH

reviews.text:
This café was a lovely surprise on our way to Dunedin. It’s one of the few places open so early, and I was really impressed with the quality in every way.

The interior is cozy and beautifully decorated, and the staff were warm and welcoming ☺️

I really appreciated being asked h
reviews.author: Jennifer

reviews.text: This place is always busy when we pass so decided to stop and we are pleased we did. Our coffee and scone were delicious and the service was amazing, within 10 minutes of ordering we had both in front of us. Stop here you won't regret it.
reviews.author: Sharon Ferguson

reviews.text: Food is over priced for the quality. I had the ham cheese tomato toasted croissant ($15).  It was only just warm. Cheese mostly not melted (what little cheese there was), overdosed with a very sweet tomato chutney.  Very tight with the quantity of fillings. This should be a $5 it
reviews.author: Simon B

reviews.text: Great Southern cheese rolls and a great place to fill up the water bottles on a hot day!
reviews.author: David Bailey
